routing_rationale: Per HNOTE explicit directive: 'Substantive overview rework. Should route through curmudgeon for adversarial review (NOT auto-integrate).' Curmudgeon focus list (8 items) is in the EXP under curmudgeon_review_focus.
summary_for_decider: Overview hero is reworked from a four-up scorecard (69/0/4+4/Wrong Side) to a thesis-led composition: operator-authored display-scale sentence ('None of the ${counts.total} predictions produces a dome-specific result that standard physics cannot already explain') + Live test pending August 12, 2026 eclipse pill chip (links to #p4-426) + four-figure body row preserving all original numbers and detail links. Verdict bar chart, accuracy-math-section, breaking news, and downstream Overview content are unchanged. Two find/replace pairs in build-scripts/generate-html.js — both anchors verified to match exactly once each. Dry-run build succeeded (3453 tests passed, 0 failed). Items 3 and 4 from the HNOTE are explicitly deferred with rationale.

round_2_recommendation_1_hero_swap.mapping: Item 1 → new <section class="thesis-hero"> with display-scale thesis statement, supplanting the four-up <div class="scorecard sc-hero">. Stats demoted to body-weight figures row beneath the thesis.

round_2_recommendation_2_verdict_distrib.mapping: Item 2 → audit found bar chart already canonical at line 1364; four-up sc-hero is NOT a verdict-distribution view (it's a high-level scorecard, structurally different). Item 1's hero swap removes the four-up tiles entirely, automatically eliminating any reviewer ambiguity.

round_2_recommendation_3_falsification_m.mapping: Item 3 → recommended for next analyst run as EXP-256. Lightweight 4-row module placed below the verdict bar. Sources content from existing #eg-falsifiability content in the Evaluation Guide tab (verified present, four conditions match HNOTE description).

round_1_followup_callout_4_how_to_evalua.mapping: Item 4 → distill the existing 5 questions in #eg-evaluate (verified present: distinguishing / derivable / accurately-represented / falsifiable / no-double-counting) into a preface block. Placement decision depends on the hero composition delivered by this EXP plus EXP-256.

round_2_callout_5_eclipse_badge.mapping: Item 5 → new pill chip 'Live test pending — August 12, 2026 eclipse' inside the thesis-hero meta row, links to #p4-426 (section 4.2.6 'What would change our verdict' — eclipse pre-commitment). Calm visual treatment (transparent fill + accent border) so it does not compete with the thesis. Pulsing accent dot for liveness, with prefers-reduced-motion override.

hero_swap_verification.thesis_sentence_at_display_scale:
Confirmed via dry-run build: rendered as

None of the 69 predictions...

at clamp(1.85rem,3.6vw,2.65rem) computed size. The literal '69' is ${counts.total} substituted (counts.total = baseWins.filter(/^\d{3}$/) count = 69 today; matches operator's example wording exactly).
hero_swap_verification.stats_demoted_to_body_row: Confirmed: <ul class="thesis-figures"> contains four <li class="tf-item"> elements with <span class="tf-number"> at 1.55rem (was 2.8rem in old hero) and <span class="tf-label"> at 0.78rem uppercase. All four original numbers preserved (claimed wins / 0 survive / failures / wrong side). Detail links preserved.
hero_swap_verification.above_the_fold_at_1440x900: Estimated total hero height: title-block (~200px) + verdict bar (~180px) + thesis (~170px for 2 lines) + meta-row (~36px) + figures (~80px) ≈ 666px. Comfortably above 900px fold. Curmudgeon will verify post-integration.
hero_swap_verification.composition_above_the_fold_check: thesis + badge + figures all visible without scrolling on standard desktop. Mobile breakpoints (760px → 2 cols, 420px → 1 col) keep the composition stacked but readable.

build_dryrun_evidence.command: cp build-scripts/generate-html.js /tmp/orig.js && (apply both find/replace patches) && node build.js html && node test.js
build_dryrun_evidence.result: Build complete (1318.3 KB docs/index.html). 3453 tests passed, 0 failed. Original generate-html.js restored after dry-run; this proposal contains the patches for the decider to apply.
build_dryrun_evidence.rendered_thesis_visible: Confirmed via grep -A 2 'id="thesis-statement"' docs/index.html during dry-run.

audit_findings_for_item_2.summary: No code change required. The verdict bar chart (EXP-209) is the canonical distribution view, already on Overview at line 1364 of generate-html.js, ABOVE the four-up sc-hero. The reviewer's 'six adjacent stat tiles' description was likely a misread of the four-up scorecard (which is structurally a different widget — high-level scorecard, not verdict distribution). Item 1's hero swap removes the four-up tiles, eliminating any residual ambiguity.

curmudgeon_focus_quick_list: Load-bearing-content audit (no claim or number lost in the demotion).
Badge does not compete with thesis (accent border on transparent, prefers-reduced-motion override).
Stress-test the deletion of dashboard-feel — was round-2 credibility lift sufficient justification? See kernel_of_truth.
Live-count substitution (${counts.total}) does not violate HNOTE 'no derived content' — see anticipated_objections #1.
Badge link target (#p4-426) survives EXP-254 integration.
(Optional) any test.js assertions you want added — design surface, not preemptively tested.
